name: BB:UBA : Unusual Times, Evening
conditions_text: when the flow(s) or event(s) occur after 18:00

TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Unusual Times, Evening on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow(s) or event(s) occur after 18:00
AND when the flow(s) or event(s) occur before 23:59
